name: Australian Meat Pie
recipeInstructions:
Making the filling:
1. Place meat into a pan and stir over low heat until well browned.
2. Drain off any surplus fat.
3. Add crumbled stock cubes, water, salt, pepper, and nutmeg; stir until boiling.
4. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer gently for 20 minutes. Remove from heat.
5. Combine extra water and flour, stirring until the flour mixture is smooth.
6. Add the flour mixture to meat and stir until combined. Return to heat and stir until meat boils and thickens.
7. Add soy sauce (to give a brown color) and stir until combined. Simmer uncovered for 5 to 10 minutes, then allow to cool.
Making the pie base:
1. Sift flour and salt into a basin.
2. Place water and beef drippings in a saucepan and stir until the dripping melts; remove from heat.
3. Make a well in the center of dry ingredients and add liquid, stirring until combined.
4. Turn out onto lightly floured surface and knead lightly. Roll out pastry to line eight greased pie tins.
5. Cut excess pastry around sides of pie plates using a sharp knife.
Pie crust:
1. Roll out puff pastry on a lightly floured surface. Cut rounds for the top of pies, using a saucer as a guide.
2. Wet edges of base pastry and gently press tops into place. Trim around edges with a sharp knife.
3. Brush tops with egg yolk and water.
Cooking:
1. Bake in a hot oven for 5 minutes or until golden brown. Reduce heat to moderate and cook further for 10 minutes.
